title: DoIT Computer Lending Program - Laptop Loaners
body: Software & Data Policy: Customers are free to install any other software that they require. Please note that we do not support customer-installed software, and all software and data is erased from the computer at the end of the loaner period. Please see DoIT Computer Lending Program - General Information for more information about the DoIT Computer Lending Program's policies. Dell Laptops Hardware Specifications: 16GB RAM, 256GB SSD (Minimum) Operating System: Windows 11 64-bit Pre-Installed Applications: Microsoft 365*, Adobe Creative Cloud* *Please note that only users with licensing for M365 services or Adobe Creative Cloud will be able to use these applications. Dell 3510 Dell 7410 Dell 7440 Dell 7490 Macbook Laptops Hardware Specifications: M2 Chip, 256GB SSD Operating System: Mac OS Sonoma Pre-Installed Applications: None 2022 Macbook Air Lost/Misplaced Chargers If a customer has lost or misplaced the charger included with their loaner, we ask that it is replaced with an equivalent one before return based on the following policy listed in DoIT Computer Lending Program - General Information : The equipment must be returned to the DoIT Computer Lending Program in the same condition that it was received, except for normal wear and tear . The following are specifications for chargers per laptop model: Dell Latitude 7410 (13in), Dell Latitude 7440 (13in), and Dell Latitude 7490 (14in): 65W USB-C Adapter NEMA 5-15P to C5 3-Slot Mickey Mouse plug (1m) ( Honglin , LongWell ) Dell Latitude 3510 (15in): 65W 4.5mm barrel AC Adapter (2m) NEMA 5-15P to C5 3-Slot Mickey Mouse plug (1m) ( Honglin , LongWell ) Macbook Air (M2, 2022): 70W USB-C Adapter USB-C to MagSafe3 cord* OR USB-C to USB-C Cord *The USB-C to MagSafe3 cord is preferred as this is the charging cord that originally comes with our 2022 Macbook Air laptops. See Also DoIT Computer Lending Program - General Information
